description: Undersea and coastal foods from ocean settings.
foods: Briny sheets of kelp rolled around rice and whatever the tide brought in.
A shimmering soup made from crushed shell and sea herbs, glowing faintly in the bowl.
A whole fish sealed inside a giant clamshell and steamed over volcanic vents until it flakes.
Hard little sweets shaped like coral branches, tasting of salt and something faintly sweet underneath.
Flat cakes made from sea-grain and pressed kelp, dense enough to survive a current.
Small translucent berries that grow on underwater vines, bursting with a salty-sweet juice when bitten.
